title: Nifty Ships + Biomes O'Plenty Compat
description: Compatibility between aleki's Nifty Ships and Biomes O' Plenty - adds all wood types from BOP for all boat types in Nifty Ships!
body:
![A stylized title reads "aleki's Nifty Ships". A stylized subtitle reads "Biomes O'Plenty Compat". The titles are overlayed on an image of Minecraft ships and boats in a harbor at sunset. Palm trees and an autumn forest rise above the beach.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5rDQT07E/images/fe61e106258f3debb517ed197838ce9944580507.png)

Adds compatibility between the wood types in [Biomes O'Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and the ships and boats in [aleki's Nifty Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/alekiships)!
